User.title: User
User.description: User profile representation in the DB

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for when the user account was initialized

Interview.title: Interview
Interview.description: An interview practice session records, containing dynamic questions, user answers, detailed AI score metrics, and structured textual feedback.

id.description: Firestore document ID of the interview record

userId.description: The authentication UID of the user who completed the interview

category.description: The context/type of the interview practice session

answers.description: A list of structured question-and-answer pairs provided during the interview

score.description: The primary overall weighted performance score out of 100

communicationScore.description: AI-evaluated score out of 100 on verbal clarity, phrasing, and response speed guidelines

technicalScore.description: AI-evaluated score out of 100 on domain logic correctness, problem solving, or accuracy

confidenceScore.description: AI-evaluated score out of 100 based on grammatical assertiveness, lack of filler phrases/hesitations

feedback.description: Exhaustive personalized markdown feedback with key strengths and developmental instructions

completedAt.description: ISO timestamp for when the interview answers were reviewed and categorized

Question.title: Question
Question.description: An interview question record generated dynamically for a user to avoid repeats and keep history.

userId.description: The authentication UID of the user who owns this generated question

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the question

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for when this question was generated

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of primary registered platform users

/interviews/{interviewId}.description: Unbounded history collection containing all previous evaluated interview runs

/questions/{questionId}.description: Collection of dynamically generated questions for each user to track history and prevent repeats
